2026-06-22TB, ECCCCanada Wildlife ActFunding to Renew Nature ProgramsOrder authorizing the Minister of the Environnement, until March 31, 2031, to lease any lands, or purchase or acquire any lands or any interests or rights in any lands, in an amount that does not exceed $35,000,000.N/A
subject: Funding to Renew Nature Programs
precis: Order authorizing the Minister of the Environnement, until March 31, 2031, to lease any lands, or purchase or acquire any lands or any interests or rights in any lands, in an amount that does not exceed $35,000,000.
